title: Glossary of Terms
text: -ADOPT (InteroperAble Descriptions Observable Property Terminology) framework precisely describing measurement represents. answers question: “exactly measure?”

title: Glossary of Terms
text: -ADOPT defines observable properties using four components: matters: Two researchers might measure “temperature” mean different things (air vs. water, surface vs. depth). -ADOPT removes ambiguity requiring specify exactly property entity measured.

title: Glossary of Terms
text: Variable: complete, compound term describes measured (e.g., “Natural spawner count”). metasalmon, maps term_iri. Property: measurable characteristic (e.g., “count”, “temperature”, “length”). Maps property_iri. Entity: thing measured (e.g., “spawning salmon”, “stream water”). Maps entity_iri. Constraint: Optional qualifiers narrow scope (e.g., “maximum”, “annual”, “wild-origin ”). Maps constraint_iri.

title: Glossary of Terms
text: -ADOPT focuses describing measured, ’ll also need record units (measurement expressed). metasalmon includes unit_iri purpose, typically linking vocabularies like QUDT. what: How To Decide If term_iri Is Correct
title: 5-Minute Quickstart
text: Use plain-language checks measurement column: suggested label describe exactly column measures? definition match intent (just similar word)? scope right (example species-level vs population-level)? unit consistent values unit_iri? Keep IRI checks pass. Replace term close exact. Remove (leave blank) candidate reliable yet. top auto-applied suggestion wrong, use semantic_suggestions.csv pick better alternative copy IRI metadata/column_dictionary.csv. candidate fits, request new term instead forcing bad match: shared cross-organization/domain terms -> https://github.com/salmon-data-mobilization/salmon-domain-ontology/issues/new/choose DFO-specific policy/operations terms -> https://github.com/dfo-pacific-science/dfo-salmon-ontology/issues/new/choose

what: 5) Decide shared salmon-domain vs DFO-specific routing
title: After Excel Review: Finalize and Publish Your Package
text: Use plain-English rule: Shared salmon-domain ontology (smn): use term describes reusable salmon science concept another program, region, organization reasonably use . DFO-specific term: use concept clearly tied DFO policy, operations, internal workflow, local identifiers, program-specific statuses, context broadly reusable outside setting. good default test : term still make sense non-DFO salmon dataset, lean SMN; term makes sense DFO local program process, lean DFO-specific.

title: Linking to Standard Vocabularies
text: Consistency: Everyone links term knows talking thing. example, connecting SPAWN_EST DFO term called “Natural spawner count” removes guesswork. Automation: Tools can read standard IRI (Internationalized Resource Identifier, kind web address definition) know expect without human explanation. Future-proofing: Standards, like DFO Salmon Ontology, evolve alongside policy. linking now, can pick improvements later.

title: Linking to Standard Vocabularies
text: Look term matches column. Use find_terms("spawner count") search DFO, OLS, vocabularies. example uses role-aware source set surfaces alignment_only can -weight Wikidata crosswalks reviewing candidates. score column shows computed ranking, factors ontology preferences, cross-source agreement, ZOOMA confidence.

title: Linking to Standard Vocabularies
text: find_terms() can query multiple vocabulary sources. Use sources_for_role() get recommended sources -ADOPT role: shared Salmon Domain Ontology queried first salmon-domain roles. reusable shared terms canonically served smn namespace (example https://w3id.org/smn/Stock), gcdfo remains DFO-specific source canonical IRIs https://w3id.org/gcdfo/salmon#. metasalmon silently rewrite legacy salmon:-namespace variants.

title: Linking to Standard Vocabularies
text: results include several columns transparency: score: Computed ranking incorporating source preferences, role boosts, cross-source agreement alignment_only: TRUE Wikidata terms (useful crosswalks, canonical modeling) agreement_sources: many sources returned term (higher = confidence) zooma_confidence/zooma_annotator: ZOOMA annotation confidence applicable Filter alignment-terms selecting canonical IRIs:
code: results <- find_terms("salmon", role = "entity", sources = sources_for_role("entity")) canonical <- results[!results$alignment_only, ]

title: Linking to Standard Vocabularies
text: search returns unexpected results, check diagnostics: Use controlled vocabulary term (SKOS concept) column holds one set codes (species, run type, etc.). Use ontology class (OWL) column names category treat type data (example, kind unit entity row ). Capture link: place chosen URI term_iri dictionary row. Mention ; need repeat URI multiple columns unless genuinely mean different things.
code: results <- find_terms("temperature", role = "property", sources = c("gcdfo", "ols", "nvs", "zooma")) diagnostics <- attr(results, "diagnostics") print(diagnostics) # Shows: source, query, status (success/error), count, elapsed_secs, error message dict <- infer_dictionary(   df,   dataset_id = "my-dataset-2026",   table_id = "main-table" )  dict$term_iri[dict$column_name == "SPAWN_EST"] <- "https://w3id.org/gcdfo/salmon#NaturalSpawnerCount"

what: Working with semantic web terms (plain language)
title: Linking to Standard Vocabularies
text: IRI: think web address points formal definition. need copy-paste ; need understand underlying formal logic. term_iri: attaches chosen web address column column self-explanatory. entity_iri property_iri: required links measurement columns. Use property_iri specify characteristic measured (e.g., “count”), entity_iri specify measured (e.g., “spawning salmon”). constraint_iri: optional -ADOPT component qualifies measurement (e.g., “maximum”, “annual average”). Use adds clarity.

what: Find candidate terms across external vocabularies — find_terms
title: Find candidate terms across external vocabularies — find_terms
text: Lightweight meta-search helper IRIs. Uses public APIs available. Implements role-aware ontology preferences per dfo-salmon-ontology CONVENTIONS.

title: Find candidate terms across external vocabularies — find_terms
code: find_terms(   query,   role = NA_character_,   sources = c("smn", "gcdfo", "ols", "nvs"),   expand_query = TRUE )

title: Find candidate terms across external vocabularies — find_terms
text: query Character search string (e.g., "spawner count", "temperature"). role Optional -ADOPT role hint ranking source selection. One : "variable" (compound term), "property" (characteristic), "entity" (thing measured), "constraint" (qualifier), "method", "unit". specified, sources optimized role results ranked higher match preferred ontologies role. sources Character vector vocabulary sources query. Options: "smn", "gcdfo", "ols", "nvs", "zooma", "qudt", "gbif", "worms", "bioportal". Default c("smn", "gcdfo", "ols", "nvs"). Use sources_for_role() get role-optimized sources. expand_query Logical. TRUE (default), applies role-aware query expansion (Phase 4) generate additional query variants based role context. example, unit queries get abbreviation expansions, method queries get "method" suffix added. Set FALSE search exact query.

title: Find candidate terms across external vocabularies — find_terms
text: Tibble columns: label, iri, source, ontology, role, match_type, definition, score, alignment_only, agreement_sources, role_hints, zooma_confidence, zooma_annotator. score column shows computed ranking score. alignment_only column indicates terms Wikidata (useful crosswalks canonical modeling). agreement_sources column indicates many sources returned IRI label (Phase 4 cross-source agreement). Returns empty tibble matches found. result "diagnostics" attribute (access via attr(result, "diagnostics")) containing per-source/query diagnostic information: source, query, status (success/error), count, elapsed_secs, error message applicable. helps explain empty results slow queries.

title: Find candidate terms across external vocabularies — find_terms
text: Supported sources: SMN (Salmon Domain Ontology): shared salmon-domain search https://w3id.org/smn/ canonical shared IRIs (e.g. https://w3id.org/smn/Stock) GCDFO (DFO Salmon Ontology): DFO-specific search https://w3id.org/gcdfo/salmon# OLS (Ontology Lookup Service): Broad cross-ontology search, API key needed NVS (NERC Vocabulary Server): Marine oceanographic terms (P01/P06) ZOOMA (EBI text--term annotations): Resolves OLS term metadata QUDT (Quantities, Units, Dimensions Types): Preferred unit role GBIF (Global Biodiversity Information Facility): Taxon backbone entity role WoRMS (World Register Marine Species): Marine taxa entity role BioPortal: Requires API key via BIOPORTAL_APIKEY environment variable Role-based ontology preferences (Phase 2): unit: QUDT preferred, NVS P06 property: STATO/OBA measurement ontologies, NVS P01 entity: smn first, gcdfo + NCEAS Salmon (ODO), GBIF/WoRMS taxa method: smn first, gcdfo: SKOS + SOSA/PROV patterns, plus AGROVOC Wikidata alignment-(lower ranking crosswalks/reconciliation) Results scored using -ADOPT vocabulary hints role-based ontology preferences, ranked relevance. "smn" included sources, shared salmon-domain ontology search runs first; "gcdfo" used deterministic DFO-specific source external sources. External fallback sources skipped SMN GCDFO returns good label match. Network calls best-effort return empty tibble failure.

title: Find candidate terms across external vocabularies — find_terms
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Search for terms matching "spawner count" results <- find_terms("spawner count") head(results)  # Search specifically for property terms property_terms <- find_terms("temperature", role = "property")  # Search for units with QUDT preference unit_terms <- find_terms("kilogram", role = "unit", sources = sources_for_role("unit"))  # Search for taxa using taxon resolvers taxa <- find_terms("Oncorhynchus kisutch", role = "entity", sources = c("gbif", "worms"))  # Search a specific source ols_results <- find_terms("salmon", sources = "ols")  # Search multiple sources all_results <- find_terms("escapement", sources = c("smn", "gcdfo", "ols", "nvs")) } # }

title: Suggest semantic annotations for a dictionary — suggest_semantics
text: df data frame tibble containing data documented, named list data frames multi-table workflows. named list supplied, suggest_semantics() matches dictionary row correct table via dict$table_id uses table's data context. dict dictionary tibble created infer_dictionary() (may incomplete semantic fields). sources Character vector vocabulary sources search. Options "smn" (Salmon Domain Ontology via content negotiation), "gcdfo" (DFO-specific source), "ols" (Ontology Lookup Service), "nvs" (NERC Vocabulary Server), "bioportal" (requires BIOPORTAL_APIKEY environment variable). Default c("smn", "gcdfo", "ols", "nvs"). include_dwc Logical; TRUE, also attach DwC-DP export mappings (via suggest_dwc_mappings()) parallel attribute dwc_mappings. Default FALSE keep UI simple non-DwC users. max_per_role Maximum number suggestions keep per -ADOPT role (variable, property, entity, unit, constraint) per column. Default 3. search_fn Function used search terms. Defaults find_terms(). Can replaced testing custom search strategies. codes Optional codes.csv-like tibble. provided, suggestions also generated missing codes.csv$term_iri targets. table_meta Optional tables.csv-like tibble. provided, suggestions generated missing tables.csv$observation_unit_iri. dataset_meta Optional dataset.csv-like tibble. provided, suggestions generated missing dataset.csv$keywords candidate semantic keywords (IRIs intended keyword curation). llm_assess Logical; TRUE, assess top semantic candidates per target LLM deterministic retrieval. first shortlist looks weak, LLM may request one bounded alternate-query pass (1–2 plain-text search phrases) single reassessment. Default FALSE. llm_provider LLM provider preset. One "openai", "openrouter", "openai_compatible", "chapi". llm_model Character model identifier. Required llm_assess = TRUE unless supplied via METASALMON_LLM_MODEL. llm_provider = "openrouter" model supplied, package defaults "openrouter/free". valid OpenRouter model ID may supplied (example "openai/gpt-5.4-mini"). llm_provider = "chapi" model supplied, package defaults "ollama2.mistral:7b" also checks CHAPI_MODEL. llm_api_key Optional API key override. omitted, provider-specific environment variables used (OPENAI_API_KEY, OPENROUTER_API_KEY, CHAPI_API_KEY, METASALMON_LLM_API_KEY). llm_base_url Optional base URL override OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint. Required llm_provider = "openai_compatible" set via METASALMON_LLM_BASE_URL. llm_provider = "chapi", package defaults https://chapi-dev.intra.azure.cloud.dfo-mpo.gc.ca/api also checks CHAPI_BASE_URL. llm_reasoning_effort Optional reasoning-effort hint forwarded OpenAI chat-completions request body llm_provider = "openai". llm_top_n Maximum number retrieved candidates send LLM per target assessment round. Default 5. llm_context_files Optional character vector local context files (example README/markdown notes, CSV dictionaries, HTML exports, DOCX files, source/notebook files .R, .Rmd, .qmd, Excel workbooks, PDF reports) used provide extra domain context LLM llm_assess = TRUE. Pass file paths, parsed data frames, XML documents, R Markdown objects. PDF support uses optional pdftools package; Excel support uses optional readxl package. llm_context_text Optional character vector extra inline context snippets passed alongside llm_context_files. llm_timeout_seconds Timeout LLM request seconds. chapi models matching gpt-oss automatically given least 120 seconds internal endpoint can slow warm . llm_request_fn Advanced/test hook overriding low-level OpenAI-compatible request function.

title: metasalmon 0.1.4
text: Fixed llm_context_files handling create_sdp() semantic-review path: context files must now supplied local file paths, parsed data-frame/XML/R Markdown objects fail early clear error, context supplied without llm_assess = TRUE now warns ignored rather silently producing deterministic-output. Clarified exported documentation create_sdp(), infer_dictionary(), infer_salmon_datapackage_artifacts(), suggest_semantics() users know context files affect explicit LLM review.

title: metasalmon 0.1.3
text: Added first package-native chat_decomposition() workflow measurement-variable review: resumable R-console sessions now keep structured curation state separate transcript history, ask grouped decomposition questions, end explicit preview/approve new-term artifact SKOS-variable / usedProcedure wording. Added deterministic fallback behavior provider-wide LLM review failures: every LLM assessment errors retrieved semantic suggestions still usable, package-native semantic review now warns preserves deterministic shortlist instead aborting whole workflow. Added llm_reasoning_effort support OpenAI semantic-review requests omit explicit temperature GPT-5 chat-completions payloads require provider default.

title: metasalmon 0.1.2
text: Fixed seeded semantic-context warning path seed_semantics = TRUE longer crashes mixed previously unsupported llm_context_files trigger cli interpolation package creation/review flows. Expanded llm_context_files handling HTML/HTM, DOCX, .R, .Rmd, .qmd inputs read normalized cleanly LLM review instead failing unsupported-file warnings. Added Excel workbook context-file support package-native LLM review, including .xls, .xlsx, .xlsm inputs via optional readxl package. Hardened LLM assessment parsing malformed accept responses without selected candidate degrade review, falsey missing_context placeholders longer pollute outputs. Expanded LLM regression coverage mixed-context bundle tests exact chapi + ollama2.mistral:7b configuration, including markdown, CSV, Excel, PDF, HTML, DOCX, notebook/source context bundles across dataset.csv, tables.csv, column_dictionary.csv, codes.csv targets. Finished scripts/llm-sanity-check.R harness richer end--end smoke tool: now generates per-case context bundles, records context formats summaries, rebuilds EDH XML simulated review pass, writes stable CSV outputs artifacts/. Added linked dedicated LLM review getting-started guide quickstart/setup docs package-native workflow easier discover.

title: metasalmon 0.1.1
text: Added first-class chapi LLM provider preset DFO’s internal Open WebUI endpoint. defaults ollama2.mistral:7b, uses https://chapi-dev.intra.azure.cloud.dfo-mpo.gc.ca/api, reads provider-specific overrides CHAPI_API_KEY, CHAPI_MODEL, CHAPI_BASE_URL, now gives slower gpt-oss responses longer effective timeout plus one retry. Updated quickstart/home-page docs internal DFO users can opt chapi directly create_sdp(..., llm_assess = TRUE), external users get parallel OpenRouter-free OpenAI-credit setup paths. Promoted create_sdp() Salmon Data Package workflow coherent release shape: single-table multi-table package creation, semantic review artifacts, post-review EDH rebuild now aligned documented primary path. Hardened final-review behavior: validate_salmon_datapackage(..., require_iris = TRUE) now fails unresolved metadata placeholders, blank table observation-unit IRIs, lingering review sentinels strict validation actually means review finished. Hardened table-level semantic review writes EDH rebuilds: LLM-selected table suggestions now write back metadata/tables.csv, write_edh_xml_from_sdp() now refuses rebuild obviously unreviewed packages. Improved package-native LLM review ergonomics: one-shot shortlist preservation now respects llm_top_n, shared llm_context_files reused across targets, non-interactive profile-scoped term requests now fail clearly instead silently emitting junk defaults. Fixed multi-table semantic seeding later tables use context instead borrowing semantic context table 1. Cleaned release docs surface: refreshed package description, fixed broken source-view links vignette anchors, removed stale GPT-era remnants orphaned assets, hid leaked internal helper pages public site, rebuilt pkgdown integrated source. Bundled matching Fraser Coho 2023–2024 starter dictionary plus provenance link installed package realistic context-file demo package-native LLM workflow.

title: metasalmon 0.0.27
text: Fixed deterministic semantic-query bug spawner-style measurement columns: property-slot query longer hard-codes count columns like natural_adult_spawners, now prefers spawner abundance shortlist semantically sensible LLM review. Added one bounded LLM exploration round weak semantic shortlists: first LLM pass comes back review/propose-new-term low-confidence, suggest_semantics(..., llm_assess = TRUE) may request 1–2 alternate plain-text search queries, rerun deterministic retrieval, merge/de-dupe candidates, reassess without letting model mint raw IRIs.

title: metasalmon 0.0.26
text: tuned OpenRouter free path practicality: openrouter/free now uses smaller pair-sized batches smaller effective candidate shortlist per target free-router prompts stay lighter larger quickstart-style runs.

title: metasalmon 0.0.25
text: Made OpenRouter free path practical full semantic review runs: live openrouter/free requests now serially batched pairs use smaller effective shortlist per target using built-HTTP client, trims request overhead without adding flaky parallel fan-. Added batch fallback safety: batched OpenRouter response malformed incomplete, metasalmon now falls back per-target assessment instead poisoning whole run. Retained 0.0.24 hardening: longer effective timeout, one retry transient failures, lighter context payloads, downgrade--review handling --range candidate indexes.

title: metasalmon 0.0.24
text: Hardened package-native LLM review flaky free-router behavior: OpenRouter free models now get longer effective timeout, one automatic retry transient HTTP/network failures, fewer context chunks per request prompts stay lighter. Hardened invalid LLM candidate-index handling: --range selected_candidate_index values longer poison whole target; downgraded review auto-selection instead surfacing hard LLM error.

title: metasalmon 0.0.23
text: Added package-native LLM semantic review top deterministic retrieval: suggest_semantics(..., llm_assess = TRUE) can now assess shortlisted candidates OpenAI-compatible providers, attach llm_* review columns semantic_suggestions, expose target-level results via attr(dict, "semantic_llm_assessments"). Added local context-file support LLM semantic review, including README/markdown/text-style files optional PDF extraction via pdftools, bounded chunking reports trimmed prompting. Added OpenRouter support package-native LLM review, including pass-model ids (OpenRouter models ending :free work without special branching). Extended infer_dictionary(), infer_salmon_datapackage_artifacts(), create_sdp() thread optional LLM semantic review arguments start-workflow. Extended apply_semantic_suggestions() strategy = "llm" min_llm_confidence explicit application LLM-reviewed matches. Updated README, GPT-collaboration vignette, entrypoint docs, tests, generated documentation 0.0.23 feature release.

title: metasalmon 0.0.22
text: Simplified EDH XML support single DFO Enterprise Data Hub HNAP export actually use: edh_build_hnap_xml() now canonical helper, edh_build_iso19139_xml() remains deprecated compatibility alias. Simplified create_sdp() EDH export behavior: include_edh_xml = TRUE now always writes metadata/metadata-edh-hnap.xml; legacy edh_profile / EDH_Profile / EDH_profile inputs still accepted deprecated compatibility shims, edh_xml_path deprecated ignored. Rebuilt reference docs, tests, package artifacts, pkgdown site 0.0.22 patch release.

title: metasalmon 0.0.20
text: Hardened GitHub helper security: GitHub readers now reject non-GitHub remote URLs avoid attaching GitHub auth headers non-GitHub hosts; improved public/private auth behavior related tests. Hardened package writing + export reliability: create_sdp() now fails fast explicit overwrite = TRUE message target directory already exists, fixed DwC validator execution path, improved ontology fetch robustness explicit timeout handling cache fallback behavior. Surfaced clearer warning messages online vocabulary API lookups time , empty find_terms() results less opaque semantic seeding. Fixed submit_term_request_issues() batch routing per-row ontology_repo values honored instead posting rows first repo. Clarified validate_semantics() API explicitly deprecating ignored legacy arguments (entity_defaults, vocab_priority) coverage warning behavior. Improved release/test hygiene: dependency bootstrap script hardening, tighter warning assertions brittle tests, refreshed package description wording.

title: metasalmon 0.0.19
text: Hardened table observation-unit auto-apply create_sdp(): table-level observation-unit suggestions now ignored driven placeholder review text auto-applied lexical compatibility checks pass non-placeholder table metadata. Improved non-measurement term_iri auto-apply quality without disabling feature: incompatible candidates now filtered using role-hint mismatch checks, match-type/score guards, token-level lexical compatibility target column context. Strengthened infer_column_role() heuristics NuSEDS-like fields: year-like columns now classified temporal reliably, NATURAL_ADULT_SPAWNERS-style quantity columns inferred measurement. Tightened default code-level seeding gates reduce free-text noise preserving useful low-cardinality categorical/attribute suggestions: text-like field names non-code-like -unique short character values excluded default factor-scope code seeding path. Added regression coverage hardening paths, including placeholder-driven table seeding prevention, bad non-measurement suggestion filtering, improved role inference fuller examples, free-text seeding guardrails. Rebuilt reference docs, tests, package artifacts, pkgdown site 0.0.19 patch release.

title: metasalmon 0.0.18
text: Reworked review placeholders missing descriptions/metadata labeled explicitly (MISSING DESCRIPTION: / MISSING METADATA:) instead ambiguous generic review wording. create_sdp() related inference paths now seed table-level observation-unit review content auto-apply top table semantic suggestion tables.csv, including observation_unit_iri backfilled observation_unit label needed. Broadened default semantic suggestion coverage beyond measurement columns conservative way: categorical controlled low-cardinality attribute columns can now receive lighter term_iri suggestions, identifier temporal columns remain excluded default non-measurement suggestion seeding. Broadened default code-level semantic seeding ordinary low-cardinality character columns typical CSV imports considered, rather relying R factor inputs. Made inferred required flags less misleading marking obvious identifier columns required leaving columns unknown (NA) reviewed, instead defaulting everything FALSE. Improved auto-filled term_type values term_iri suggestions applied kept target_description vs column_description distinction explicit suggestion outputs. Added second bundled official NuSEDS example dataset: nuseds-fraser-coho-2023-2024.csv (173 rows across 2023–2024), keeping existing 30-row demo sample intact. Added reproducible provenance bundled NuSEDS examples via data-raw/nuseds_fraser_coho_examples.R documented upstream Open Government Canada record/resource licensing. Updated README, vignettes, reference docs, tests reflect broader semantic seeding behavior, required-flag review stance, observation-unit handling, tiny-vs-fuller example-data workflow.

title: metasalmon 0.0.17
text: split variable/property query behavior NATURAL_SPAWNERS_TOTAL longer defaults roles abundance concept, added count-like unit fallback query (count) measurement columns clearly represent totals/counts/abundance. Added/updated regression tests role-aware query behavior, count-like unit fallback, unit-label backfill applying unit suggestions.

title: metasalmon 0.0.16
text: Rewrote README-review.txt intro checklist shorter, first-time friendly, action-oriented. create_sdp() now prints explicit -front note semantic seeding may take minutes. Improved column-level semantic query construction measurement fields placeholder text used query source. Added role-aware query shaping improves built-sample suggestions NATURAL_SPAWNERS_TOTAL (e.g., variable/property SpawnerAbundance, entity Population, constraint NaturalOrigin) avoids previous exploitation/mortality-rate mismatches. Unit suggestions now skipped unit context exists, applying unit suggestion now backfills unit_label missing.

title: metasalmon 0.0.15
text: create_sdp() now tells users front online semantic seeding may take minutes points seed_semantics = FALSE fastest first pass. Simplified README-review.txt shorter 7-step checklist review flow easier follow.

title: metasalmon 0.0.14
text: Simplified package-creation surface create_sdp() clear one-shot entrypoint, write_salmon_datapackage() advanced/manual writer, older create--data helper removed. Reworked create_sdp() output cleaner review layout metadata/ data/ subdirectories, package-root README-review.txt, package-root semantic_suggestions.csv (present), root datapackage.json. Rewrote README-review.txt step--step checklist explains canonical Salmon Data Package, share full package folder (zip), return R validation. Tightened default semantic seeding code-level semantic suggestions run factor/categorical source columns default, keeping column-level table-level seeding available. Added optional update notifications inside create_sdp() via check_updates, using explicit check_for_updates() helper rather package-attach network checks. Refreshed README, vignettes, reference pages, generated documentation, tests, pkgdown outputs match new workflow layout.

title: metasalmon 0.0.13
text: Added vendored SDP Frictionless metadata schemas, profile, custom rules; schema loader tries remote smn-data-pkg schema bundle first, warns falls back vendored copy. Changed package creation write canonical metadata/ + data/ layout generating root datapackage.json SDP Frictionless profile default. Added write_datapackage = TRUE package creation helpers callers can opt draft authoring. Updated package reading prefer nested metadata/ files, legacy root-level metadata, datapackage.json fallback. Made edh_build_iso19139_xml() default richer North American Profile / HNAP-aware EDH export keeping profile = "iso19139" available explicit fallback. Expanded EDH export support bilingual locale scaffolding, deterministic identifiers, legal constraints, maintenance/status, reference systems, bounding boxes, distribution metadata, regression coverage confirmed EDH sample shape. Added apply_semantic_suggestions() explicit opt-merges suggest_semantics() results dictionaries. Updated read_salmon_datapackage() prefer canonical nested metadata, preserve legacy root-level reading, read profile-aware datapackage.json descriptors CSV metadata absent. Refreshed README, vignettes, pkgdown reference metadata, GPT collaboration guidance match EDH default/export semantics explicit dictionary-application workflow. Rebuilt package documentation, tests, source tarball, pkgdown site 0.0.13 release.

title: metasalmon 0.0.12
text: Added GCDFO-backed find_terms() search backend queries DFO Salmon Ontology first via content negotiation https://w3id.org/gcdfo/salmon. salmon-domain roles, find_terms() now prioritizes GCDFO results falls back OLS/NVS GCDFO returns good label hit. Updated suggest_semantics(), infer_dictionary(seed_semantics = TRUE), man pages, vignettes reflect new GCDFO-first search behavior. Rebuilt package documentation, tests, source tarball, pkgdown site 0.0.12 release.

Dictionary validation now normalizes optional semantic columns returns normalized dictionary. Vignettes now show end--end semantic enrichment (-ADOPT-aware suggestions) align smn-gpt.
